prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-SUPERSCOOP-5PC-KIT-PARENT Product Type: METAL_DETECTOR Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor 5pc Metal Detecting Accessories Sand Scoop Digger Tools Kit, Drawstring Bag Coin Probe (3 Styles) Description: Whether you're already a metal detecting enthusiast or just beginning this new hobby, the ASR Outdoor 5pc treasure hunting kit comes with everything you'll need to quickly dig through silt, sand, and dirt for precious metals and gems. Inside the kit, you'll find a trowel, a sand scoop with sifting holes, a beach digger scoop with a built-in coin probe, and a drawstring backpack to hold all of the kit items.

The hand trowel is constructed of lightweight and durable plastic and features a 4-inch measuring scale to control the depth of digging. It also features a rubberized thumb grip for added comfort and a convenient hang hole on the handle for easy storage when not in use.

We've also included a 9" length sand scoop featuring a 6" wide mouth for removing sand and rocks while digging for treasure. Each scoop has 78 holes and is made of single-construction durable plastic to ensure a long life. This material is especially useful during metal detection because it will not give false positive readings under a metal detector or pinpointer.

Additionally, we've added a large sand scoop with an ergonomic handle that also doubles as a coin probe so you can more easily locate metals while digging in dirt, sand, and soft-pack gravel areas. All of these items fit inside a durable polyester drawstring backpack so you can travel with them easily. The bag features reinforced corners and measures 17" x 12.5". This kit is a great gift idea for yourself or other metal-detecting enthusiasts and treasure hunters. Search Terms: mini backpack metal detector accessories for adults metal detecting kits treasure hunting metal detector kits beach digging Features: - 5PC METAL DETECTING TOOLS BUNDLE: ASR Outdoor metal detecting kit comes with 5 treasuring hunting essentials: a trowel shovel, a sand scoop with sifting holes, a beach digger scoop with matching coin probe; All kit pieces fit inside included drawstring backpack for easy clean up - 11 INCH HAND TROWEL: Hand trowel is made of durable, lightweight plastic featuring a 4 inch measuring scale to control depth of digging; Comes with rubberized thumb grip for added comfort and ease of use; Hang up hole on handle for easy storage when not in use - METAL DETECTING SAND SCOOP: 9" length sand scoop features 6" wide mouth for easily removing rocks and sand while digging for treasure; 78 holes per scoop assists with removing silt from river beds; Made of single construction durable plastic that will not give false positive readings under a metal detector - SAND SCOOP DIGGER WITH COIN PROBE: Accessories kit also comes with large sand scoop with an ergonomic handle; Handle also doubles as a coin probe for locating precious metals and gems while beach digging and treasure hunting - DRAWSTRING BACKPACK: Durable polyester travel backpack features strong grommets for security strings and stopper for keeping contents safely in the bag during travel; Measures 17" x 12.5" and comes with reinforced corners ideal for commuting and prospecting === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor 5pc Metal Detecting Accessories Sand Scoop Kit
